q.en: Where was Brady spending his vacation with his parents?
q.zh: 布雷迪和父母在哪里度假？

options.en: Italy according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 意大利（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The text states, 'Brady was on vacation with his parents in Greece.'
explain.zh: 文中写道：'布雷迪和父母在希腊度假。'

q.en: Whom did Brady's parents arrange for him to meet while they visited the Athens National Museum?
q.zh: 布雷迪的父母去雅典国家博物馆时，安排他和谁见面？

options.en: The cook in the restaurant according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 餐厅的厨师（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book says Brady's parents 'had arranged for him to meet Dimitri, an old family friend, while they went to the Athens National Museum.'
explain.zh: 书中说布雷迪的父母'安排他和迪米特里——一位老朋友见面，而他们去了雅典国家博物馆。'

q.en: The Tower of the Winds is described as a marble tower with how many sides?
q.zh: 风之塔被描述为一座大理石塔，它有几面？

explain.en: The text describes 'a two-story-high marble tower with eight sides.'
explain.zh: 文中描述'一座两层高、有八面的白色大理石塔。'

q.en: According to Dimitri, what did the rods and straight lines on the Tower of the Winds do?
q.zh: 据迪米特里说，风之塔上的金属杆和直线有什么作用？

options.en: Measured the strength of the wind according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 测量风力（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Told the time of day and the time of year
options.zh: 指示一天中的时间和一年中的时令

explain.en: Dimitri explains the rods and lines 'informed citizens of Athens of the exact time of day' and 'revealed the exact time of year'—it was both a sundial and a calendar.
explain.zh: 迪米特里解释说，这些杆和线'告知雅典市民一天中的确切时间'，并'显示一年中的确切时令'——它既是日晷也是日历。

q.en: How was the Greek theater's shape designed to help the audience hear the actors?
q.zh: 希腊剧场的形状是如何设计来帮助观众听到演员声音的？

options.en: It had microphones hidden in the seats according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 座位里藏了麦克风（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: It was a bowl that trapped sound from the stage
options.zh: 它是一个能拢住舞台声音的碗形结构

options.en: It was a tall, straight wall
It echoed off a flat roof

explain.en: The text says the theater was 'divided into three equal sections' tilted at angles that 'created a bowl that trapped the sound from the stage. No matter where you sat, the sound was the same.'
explain.zh: 文中说剧场'分成三个相等的部分'，以略微更高的角度倾斜，'形成一个能拢住舞台声音的碗。无论你坐在哪里，声音都是一样的。'

q.en: About what year was the Theater of Dionysus built, when there were no microphones?
q.zh: 狄俄尼索斯剧场大约建于哪一年，那时还没有麦克风？

options.en: 400 AD according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 公元400年（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Dimitri says, 'Brady, it was 400 BC... There were no microphones.'
explain.zh: 迪米特里说：'布雷迪，那是公元前400年……那时没有麦克风。'

q.en: Into how many equal sections was the theater divided?
q.zh: 剧场被分成几个相等的部分？

options.en: Five according to some versions of the story

explain.en: The book states the theater 'was divided into three equal sections. There was a lower, middle, and upper section.'
explain.zh: 书中说剧场'被分成三个相等的部分，分别是下层、中层和上层。'

q.en: What stood at the highest point of the Acropolis hill?
q.zh: 在卫城小山的最高点矗立着什么？

options.en: A stone temple with massive marble columns
options.zh: 一座有巨大大理石柱的石头神庙

options.en: A giant bronze statue of Zeus according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一座巨大的宙斯青铜像（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The text says, 'On the highest point of the Acropolis hill stood a stone temple with massive columns of marble.'
explain.zh: 文中说：'在卫城小山的最高点，矗立着一座有巨大大理石圆柱的石头神庙。'

q.en: What important lesson does Dimitri want Brady to learn?
q.zh: 迪米特里希望布雷迪学到的重要一课是什么？

options.en: To memorize every date in history according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 记住历史上的每一个日期（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: To pay more attention to the little details of life
options.zh: 多留意生活中细微的细节

explain.en: Dimitri tells Brady, 'You need to pay more attention to the little details of life.' Brady later thanks him for 'opening my eyes.'
explain.zh: 迪米特里对布雷迪说：'你需要多留意生活中细微的细节。'布雷迪后来感谢他'让我开了眼界'。

q.en: How does Brady think he will leave Greece?
q.zh: 布雷迪认为自己会以怎样的状态离开希腊？

options.en: The same as when he arrived according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 和刚来时一样（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A different person than when he arrived
options.zh: 和刚来时不同的一个人

explain.en: The story ends with Brady thinking 'he would leave Greece a different person than he was when he arrived.'
explain.zh: 故事结尾布雷迪想'他将以一个不同于刚来时的人离开希腊。'

prompt.en: Imagine you are Brady writing a postcard to a friend after your trip. Describe one thing you saw in Greece and what you learned from Dimitri.
prompt.zh: 假设你是布雷迪，旅行后给朋友写明信片。描述你在希腊看到的一样东西，以及你从迪米特里身上学到了什么。

en: Mention a specific landmark such as the Tower of the Winds, the theater, or the temple.
Explain Dimitri's lesson about noticing life's small details.
Use your own words and at least three sentences.
zh: 提到一个具体地标，如风之塔、剧场或神庙。
解释迪米特里关于留意生活细节的道理。
用自己的话写至少三句话。
